items.title: Global Temperature Sensors Market to Hit USD 12,234.2 Million by 2035, Surging Steadily at 4.3% CAGR, Driven by IoT, Wearables, and Industrial Automation | Future Market Insights, Inc.
items.author: Nikhil Kaitwade (Associate Vice President At Future Market Insights, Inc.)
items.description: The global temperature sensors market is projected to grow from $8,030.3 million in 2025 to $12,234.2 million by 2035, driven by the rise of Industry 4.0, increasing IoT adoption, advancements in wearable technology, and growing demand for precision monitoring in various industries.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article lists Analog Devices as one of the key players in the temperature sensors market, suggesting their involvement and ability to capitalize on the industry's expansion.
Texas Instruments is mentioned as a prominent company in the temperature sensors industry, implying their technological expertise and potential to contribute to the market's growth.
Honeywell International is listed as a leading player in the temperature sensors market, indicating their strong market position and ability to benefit from the industry's expansion.
NXP Semiconductors N.V. is mentioned as a prominent player in the temperature sensors market, implying their technological expertise and ability to contribute to the industry's expansion.
Amphenol is mentioned as a key player in the temperature sensors market, indicating their involvement and ability to capitalize on the industry's expansion.
